## setReviewIntervalDescriptor variable

Centralized descriptor for the `review-interval-set` command.

Drives MCP tool `project_review_interval_set`<!-- -->. The CLI exposes both get and set through the combined `review-interval` command (hand-wired).

**Signature:**

```typescript
setReviewIntervalDescriptor: import("../registry/define.js").ResolvedCommandDescriptor<{
    projectId: string;
    intervalDays: number;
}, ReviewIntervalResult, z.ZodObject<{
    projectId: z.ZodString;
    intervalDays: z.ZodNumber;
}, "strip", z.ZodTypeAny, {
    projectId: string;
    intervalDays: number;
}, {
    projectId: string;
    intervalDays: number;
}>>
```
